measures.name: User Defined Census Count
measures.dax:
SWITCH (
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Filter Adults/Peds'[Filter Adults/Peds], "(All)" ),
        "(All)", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count] ),
        "Adults", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count Adults] ),
        "Peds", SUM ( 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Count Peds] )
    )

calculatedColumns.name: Date agg_Monthly
calculatedColumns.dax:
SWITCH (
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ),
        "Monthly", "Include",
        "Exclude"
    )

calculatedColumns.name: Date agg_Daily
calculatedColumns.dax:
SWITCH (
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Date Agg Level'[Date Agg Level], "Monthly" ),
        "Daily", "Include",
        "Exclude"
    )

pending.caption: Start Month Contains Partial Data?
pending.formula:
IF
YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([Parameters].[Parameter 3]))
AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([Parameters].[Parameter 3]))
AND MIN([Parameters].[Parameter 3]) <> DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MIN(MIN([Census Date]))))+'-'+STR(MONTH(WINDOW_MIN(MIN([Census Date]))))+'-01')
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

pending.caption: End Month Contains Partial Data?
pending.formula:
IF MONTH(MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120])) = 12 THEN
    IF YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]))
    AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]))
    AND MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]) <> DATEADD('day', -1, DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))+1)+'-'+STR(MONTH(DATEADD('month', 1, WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))))+'-01'))
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
ELSEIF YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]))
    AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]))
    AND MAX([Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120]) <> DATEADD('day', -1, DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date]))))+'-'+STR(MONTH(DATEADD('month', 1, WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))))+'-01'))
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
END

pending.caption: Default Start Date
pending.formula:
IF MONTH(TODAY()) >= 7 OR MONTH(TODAY()) <= 9 
THEN DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())) + '-01-01')
ELSE
    IF MONTH(TODAY()) < 7 THEN
        DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())-1) + '-07-01')
    ELSE DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())) + '-07-01')
    END
END

pending.caption: Partial Months in View?
pending.formula:
IF DAY([Parameters].[Parameter 3]) != 1
    OR DAY(DATEADD('day',1,[Parameters].[Start Date (copy)_305681891901829120])) != 1
THEN "**Partial months are displayed in GRAY**" ELSE "" END
